title: 10 Pack Stainless Steel Cocktail Picks, Reusable Fruit Sticks Metal Martini Skewers Olive Drink Picks Set for Holiday Party Events, Circle/Ball,2 Styles Tops- Silver
features: Sophisticated Finial: Decorative tops of the stainless steel cocktail skewer set are designed on shape of ring,ball. Garnish your drink with these gorgeous metal drink picks and boost your cocktail presentation.

Versatile: 4.3 inch/11 cm long, great for skewering olives, cheeses, cherries, fruit garnish in Martini or Bloody Mary. Also can be used as appetizers picks. Endless possibilities in application. A must have in your next party events.

Eco-Friendly & Reusable: In stainless steel, elegant display but sturdy construction. Designed to last and no need to throw drink skewers anymore. Dishwasher safe. Just wash off old flavors before next bartending work.
Durable Material: The martini picks set are made of professional Stainless Steel 304 and dishwasher safe for home or commercial dishwashers, these picks are designed to last a lifetime.
description: Feature: These cocktail picks are styled to match what you’ll find in some of the world’s best cocktail bars and top bartender competitions. Made of professional Stainless Steel 304 and dishwasher safe for home or commercial dishwashers, these picks are designed to last a lifetime. Don’t throw away a toothpick or plastic pick with every cocktail you make - reuse these instead. Splinter-free and designed to last, you’ll never have to buy cocktail picks again. They’re great for olives, cherries, citrus or fruit garnishes in your cocktails, and they make great hors d'oeuvres picks as well. Perfect for your next cocktail party. We always focus on offering best service and high quality products. Full refund or replacement for any reason if unsatisfied with these cocktail picks. Please rest assured to buy. Package include : 5 x ball shape handle stainless steel cocktail picks 5 x circular ring shape handle stainless steel cocktail picks
